items.definition_en: A bee is an insect that makes honey.
items.example_en: A bee landed on the flower.

items.definition_en: A butterfly is an insect with colorful wings.
items.example_en: A butterfly flew over the garden.

items.definition_en: An ant is a small insect that lives in groups.
items.example_en: Ants carried food across the path.

items.definition_en: A snail is a small animal with a spiral shell.
items.example_en: A snail moved slowly on the wet grass.

items.definition_en: A slug is a soft animal without a shell.
items.example_en: A slug ate holes in the lettuce leaves.

items.definition_en: A worm is a small, thin animal that lives in the soil.
items.example_en: A worm helps the soil in the garden.

items.definition_en: A ladybird is a small beetle with spots on its back.
items.example_en: A ladybird crawled on the plant.

items.definition_en: A spider is a small animal that makes webs.
items.example_en: A spider built a web between the branches.

items.definition_en: A frog is a small animal that jumps and lives near water.
items.example_en: A frog sat on a stone by the pond.

items.definition_en: A toad is an animal like a frog but with dry skin.
items.example_en: A toad hid under the leaves.

items.definition_en: A hedgehog is a small animal with sharp spines.
items.example_en: A hedgehog walked along the garden fence.

items.definition_en: A mouse is a small rodent with a long tail.
items.example_en: A mouse ran across the garden path.

items.definition_en: A blackbird is a bird with black feathers and a yellow beak.
items.example_en: A blackbird sang in the tree.

items.definition_en: A robin is a small bird with a red breast.
items.example_en: A robin looked for worms on the lawn.

items.definition_en: A sparrow is a small, brown and grey bird.
items.example_en: A sparrow perched on the fence.

items.definition_en: A crow is a large black bird.
items.example_en: A crow flew over the garden.

items.definition_en: A squirrel is a small animal with a bushy tail that climbs trees.
items.example_en: A squirrel chased another up the tree.

items.definition_en: A mole is a small animal that lives under the ground.
items.example_en: A mole made small hills in the lawn.

items.definition_en: A fox is a wild animal with a pointed nose and bushy tail.
items.example_en: A fox walked quietly at the edge of the garden.

items.definition_en: A newt is a small animal like a lizard that lives in water.
items.example_en: A newt hid under the pond plants.
